description_long: This is an adult male standing with a confident posture, hands resting on his hips. He is dressed in a casual yet slightly formal outfit, featuring a fitted blazer over a plain t-shirt and straight-cut pants. The figure's shoes are simple and dark, complementing the overall attire. His hair is styled short and swept upward, giving a neat and modern appearance. The facial expression is friendly, with a slight smile, and a pocket square is visible in the blazer, adding a touch of detail. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits well, suggesting a typical urban pedestrian.
description: An adult male in a blazer, t-shirt, and pants stands confidently with hands on hips and a neat, upward-styled haircut.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, blazer with pocket square, t-shirt, and hands on hips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the blazer, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blazer, pants, and hairstyle, with hands on hips.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with clear view of the hand placement and shoe shape.
attribute_clothing_type: casual blazer over a plain t-shirt with straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands on hips
